caption: A screen recording captures a web page from "RANDOM.ORG" used as a "List Randomizer." The page displays a numbered list of names, including "Ryan Presnell," "Michael Loguericio," and "Steve Herrick." An overlay shows a chat window where a user named "glowbog27" says "turning," and a bot named "Nightbot" posts, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/JsSce8K9." A small video feed in the bottom right features a man with dark hair and a beard wearing a black shirt, positioned in front of a red and white "JASYP" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.com." As the video progresses, the page transitions from the results of a randomization to the original input list, which begins with "1. Ryan Presnell." The top of the page contains navigation links for "Games," "Numbers," and "Drawings," while a footer displays "© 1998-2023 RANDOM.ORG."
